rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §255.008 governs political advertising disclosure for judicial offices. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 255.008. DISCLOSURE ON POLITICAL ADVERTISING FOR JUDICIAL OFFICE.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
